recommendations.title: Screamers

recommendations.title: Extreme Ops
recommendations.overview: While filming an advertisement, some extreme sports enthusiasts unwittingly stop a group of terrorists.

recommendations.title: Scanners III: The Takeover
recommendations.overview: A young scanner with extraordinary telepathic powers transforms into a lethal killing machine after taking one of her father's experimental drugs.

recommendations.title: Ride Above
recommendations.overview: Growing up among horses at her parents' stud farm, Zoé dreams of becoming a jockey and forms a deep bond with a young horse. A terrible accident threatens to end their racing careers, but they fight to reach victory together.

recommendations.title: Scanners II: The New Order
recommendations.overview: A breed of humans with dangerously powerful telepathic abilities -- the scanners -- are being recruited by a corrupt police commander, John Forrester, in his crusade to take over the city.

recommendations.title: Boot Camp

recommendations.title: Jappeloup

recommendations.title: Belle and Sebastian: The Adventure Continues

recommendations.title: Defiance
